These three exchanges handle roughly 60% of all US equity trading, with NYSE at 22%, Nasdaq at 19% and CBOE having over 16% market share. insight_events.title: Insider conviction: exceptional

insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Review the evidence and decide whether the ticker needs a research note or thesis update.

insight_events.title: Core business accelerating
insight_events.summary: Core operating metrics (revenues, operating income) are accelerating together — growth moved from +270.2% to +262.4% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.

top_claims.claim: Core operating metrics (revenues, operating income) are accelerating together — growth moved from +270.2% to +262.4% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
Tomczyk Fredric J reported an insider purchase of 14,817 shares ($3,625,868).

Cboe Global Markets is a toll collector on global derivatives, cash equities, and market-data subscriptions with minimal balance-sheet risk. FY2025 filings confirm $4,714.2 million revenues, $1,467.1 million operating income, and $1,752.6 million operating cash flow; Q1 2026 held momentum at $1,272.8 million net revenu

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Peak earnings trap if volatility and index trading normalize while the market keeps a premium multiple on transaction revenue.
Competitive share loss in U.S. equities to newer exchanges compresses take rates.
Regulatory intervention on options market structure or data fees.
